test: test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; print(md.version("deepTools"))')" = '3.5.6' && test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; print(md.version("deeptoolsintervals"))')" = '0.1.9' && deeptools --version | grep -Fx 'deeptools 3.5.6' >/dev/null && python -c 'import deeptools, deeptoolsintervals, matplotlib, numpy, plotly, py2bit, pyBigWig, pysam, scipy'

deeptools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tools for BAM and bigWig file processing' >/dev/null && deeptools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'plotHeatmap' >/dev/null && for cmd in alignmentSieve bamCompare bamCoverage bamPEFragmentSize bigwigAverage bigwigCompare computeGCBias computeMatrix computeMatrixOperations correctGCBias estimateReadFiltering estimateScaleFactor multiBamSummary multiBigwigSummary plotCorrelation plotCoverage plotEnrichment plotFingerprint plotHeatmap plotPCA plotProfile; do "$cmd" --help 2>&1 | grep -E 'usage:|Usage:' >/dev/null; done

tmp=/tmp/taf-deeptools-bam-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; data=/opt/deeptools/share/testdata; bamCoverage -b "$data/sample1.bam" -o sample1.bw --binSize 10 --numberOfProcessors 1 && test -s sample1.bw && multiBamSummary bins --bamfiles "$data/sample1.bam" "$data/sample2.bam" -out bam_summary.npz --binSize 100 --numberOfProcessors 1 && test -s bam_summary.npz && plotCorrelation -in bam_summary.npz --corMethod pearson --whatToPlot heatmap -o correlation.png && test -s correlation.png && alignmentSieve -b "$data/sample1.bam" -o filtered.bam --minMappingQuality 10 --numberOfProcessors 1 && test -s filtered.bam && estimateReadFiltering -b "$data/sample1.bam" --minMappingQuality 10 > filtering.tsv && test -s filtering.tsv && cd / && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-deeptools-bigwig-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; data=/opt/deeptools/share/testdata; bamCoverage -b "$data/sample1.bam" -o sample1.bw --binSize 10 --numberOfProcessors 1 && bamCoverage -b "$data/sample2.bam" -o sample2.bw --binSize 10 --numberOfProcessors 1 && test -s sample1.bw && test -s sample2.bw && multiBigwigSummary bins -b sample1.bw sample2.bw -out bigwig_summary.npz --binSize 100 --numberOfProcessors 1 && test -s bigwig_summary.npz && computeMatrix scale-regions -S sample1.bw sample2.bw -R "$data/regions.bed" -o matrix.gz --regionBodyLength 100 --beforeRegionStartLength 0 --afterRegionStartLength 0 --numberOfProcessors 1 && test -s matrix.gz && plotHeatmap -m matrix.gz -out heatmap.png && plotProfile -m matrix.gz -out profile.png && test -s heatmap.png && test -s profile.png && bigwigAverage -b sample1.bw sample2.bw -o average.bw && bigwigCompare -b1 sample1.bw -b2 sample2.bw -o compare.bw && test -s average.bw && test -s compare.bw && cd / && rm -rf "$tmp"

ACGTACGTACGT

ACGTACGT

ACGTACGTACGT
' > reads1.fa && printf '>seq2

meta.summary: Fast BAM/CRAM depth and coverage calculation for WGS, exome, and targeted sequencing.
meta.description: Fast BAM/CRAM depth and coverage calculation for WGS, exome, and targeted sequencing.

test: mosdepth --version | grep -Fx 'mosdepth 0.3.14' >/dev/null && mosdepth --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: mosdepth [options]' >/dev/null && mosdepth_d4 --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--d4' >/dev/null && { ldd $(command -v mosdepth) 2>&1 || true; } | grep -E '(not a dynamic executable|statically linked)' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mosdepth-summary && cd /tmp/taf-mosdepth-summary && mosdepth -n out /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/ovl.bam && test -s out.mosdepth.summary.txt && test -s out.mosdepth.global.dist.txt && grep -F 'MT	16569	80	0.00	0	1' out.mosdepth.summary.txt >/dev/null && test ! -e out.per-base.bed.gz

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mosdepth-perbase && cd /tmp/taf-mosdepth-perbase && mosdepth --fast-mode out /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/ovl.bam && test -s out.per-base.bed.gz && gzip -cd out.per-base.bed.gz | grep -F 'MT	6	42	2' >/dev/null && grep -F 'total	16569	116	0.01	0	2' out.mosdepth.summary.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mosdepth-regions && cd /tmp/taf-mosdepth-regions && mosdepth -n --by /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/track.bed --thresholds 0,1,2 out /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/ovl.bam && test -s out.regions.bed.gz && test -s out.thresholds.bed.gz && gzip -cd out.regions.bed.gz | grep -F 'MT	2	80	aregion	1.00' >/dev/null && gzip -cd out.thresholds.bed.gz | grep -F 'MT	2	80	aregion	78	78	0' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mosdepth-quant && cd /tmp/taf-mosdepth-quant && MOSDEPTH_Q0=NO_COVERAGE MOSDEPTH_Q1=COVERED mosdepth -n --quantize 0:1:1000 out /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/ovl.bam && test -s out.quantized.bed.gz && gzip -cd out.quantized.bed.gz | grep -F 'MT	0	80	COVERED' >/dev/null && gzip -cd out.quantized.bed.gz | grep -F 'MT	80	16569	NO_COVERAGE' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mosdepth-chrom-end && cd /tmp/taf-mosdepth-chrom-end && mosdepth -n --by /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/chrom-end/region-not-ok.bed out /opt/mosdepth/share/testdata/chrom-end/minimal.bam && test -s out.mosdepth.summary.txt && test -s out.regions.bed.gz

meta.summary: Aggregate bioinformatics analysis results across many samples and tools into a single interactive HTML report.
meta.description: Aggregate bioinformatics analysis results across many samples and tools into a single interactive HTML report.

test: test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata; print(importlib.metadata.version("multiqc"))')" = '1.35'
multiqc --version 2>&1 | grep -F '1.35' >/dev/null
multiqc --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && multiqc --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MultiQC' >/dev/null
python -c 'import multiqc, plotly, pyarrow, polars, yaml, rich_click, pydantic'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-multiqc-custom && cd /tmp/taf-multiqc-custom && printf 'id: "taf_custom_metrics"
section_name: "TAFFISH Custom Metrics"
description: "Minimal custom content smoke test."
plot_type: "bargraph"
pconfig:
  id: "taf_custom_bargraph"
  title: "TAFFISH Custom Metrics"
  ylab: "Count"
data:
  sample_a:
    metric_a: 12
    metric_b: 4
  sample_b:
    metric_a: 8
    metric_b: 9
' > metrics_mqc.yaml && multiqc . --outdir out --data-format json --force --quiet && test -s out/multiqc_report.html && test -s out/multiqc_data/multiqc_data.json && grep -F 'TAFFISH Custom Metrics' out/multiqc_report.html >/dev/null && grep -F 'taf_custom_bargraph' out/multiqc_data/multiqc_data.json >/dev/null

python -c 'import os, plotly.graph_objects as go; fig = go.Figure(data=[go.Bar(x=["sample"], y=[1])]); fig.write_image("/tmp/taf-multiqc-kaleido.png"); assert os.path.getsize("/tmp/taf-multiqc-kaleido.png") > 0'

upstream.name: MultiQC
upstream.citation: Ewels et al. 2016

muscle -version 2>&1 | sed -n '1p' | grep -Fx 'muscle 5.3.linux64 [v5.3-taffish-r1]' >/dev/null
muscle -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Align FASTA input' >/dev/null
muscle -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Ensemble FASTA (EFA)' >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v muscle)" 2>&1 | grep -F 'not a dynamic executable' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-muscle-align && cd /tmp/taf-muscle-align && printf '>s1
ACGTACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTCGTACGT
>s3
ACGTACGACGT
' > in.fa && muscle -align in.fa -output aln.afa >/dev/null 2> align.log && test -s aln.afa && grep -F '>s1' aln.afa >/dev/null && grep -F '>s2' aln.afa >/dev/null && grep -F '>s3' aln.afa >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-muscle-super5 && cd /tmp/taf-muscle-super5 && printf '>s1
ACGTACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTCGTACGT
>s3
ACGTACGACGT
' > in.fa && muscle -super5 in.fa -output super5.afa >/dev/null 2> super5.log && test -s super5.afa && grep -F '>s1' super5.afa >/dev/null

ACGTACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTCGTACGT
>s3
ACGTACGACGT
' > in.fa && muscle -align in.fa -diversified -replicates 2 -output ensemble.efa >/dev/null 2> ensemble.log && test -s ensemble.efa && grep -F '<none.0' ensemble.efa >/dev/null && muscle -maxcc ensemble.efa -output maxcc.afa >/dev/null 2> maxcc.log && test -s maxcc.afa && muscle -resample ensemble.efa -replicates 1 -output resampled.efa >/dev/null 2> resample.log && test -s resampled.efa && muscle -efa_explode ensemble.efa >/dev/null 2> explode.log && test -s none.0 && test -s abc.1

tmp=/tmp/taf-rseqc-core-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; python -c 'import pysam; header={"HD":{"VN":"1.6","SO":"coordinate"},"SQ":[{"SN":"chr1","LN":1000}]}; out=pysam.AlignmentFile("tiny.bam","wb",header=header); a=pysam.AlignedSegment(); a.query_name="r1"; a.query_sequence="ACGT"*12+"AC"; a.flag=0; a.reference_id=0; a.reference_start=100; a.mapping_quality=60; a.cigar=[(0,50)]; a.query_qualities=pysam.qualitystring_to_array("I"*50); out.write(a); out.close(); pysam.index("tiny.bam")' && printf 'chr1\t90\t220\tgene1\t0\t+\t90\t220\t0\t1\t130\t0\n' > genes.bed && bam_stat.py -i tiny.bam > bam_stat.out && grep -F 'Total records:' bam_stat.out >/dev/null && grep -F 'mapq >= mapq_cut (unique):' bam_stat.out >/dev/null && infer_experiment.py -i tiny.bam -r genes.bed -s 10 > infer.out 2>&1 && grep -E 'This is SingleEnd Data|Unknown Data type' infer.out >/dev/null && read_distribution.py -i tiny.bam -r genes.bed > distribution.out && grep -F 'Total Reads' distribution.out >/dev/null
